ddls:
CREATE TABLE "podcast_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each podcast series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the podcast series */,
  "series_theme" TEXT /* Theme or category of the podcast series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the podcast series */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the series was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the series was last updated */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the series image */,
  "category" TEXT /* Main category of the podcast series */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the podcast series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "podcast_episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each podcast episode */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the podcast series the episode belongs to */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Number of the episode in the series */,
  "episode_title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the episode */,
  "episode_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the episode (e.g., 30 min) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the episode was released */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the episode media */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the episode media file in MB */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the episode media (e.g., MP3, MP4) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the episode was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the episode was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the episode */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Indicates if the episode contains explicit content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_podcast_episodes_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES podcast_series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the host */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the host */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the host's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Name of the guest */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the guest */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the guest's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_hosts" (
  "episode_host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode-host relationship */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the host in the episode (e.g., host, co-host) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_hosts_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES podcast_episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_hosts_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_guests" (
  "episode_guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode-guest relationship */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the guest in the episode (e.g., guest, panelist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_guests_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES podcast_episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_guests_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Subscription status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the activity is related to */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., play, download, share) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the activity (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES podcast_episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media share */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode that was shared */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform where the episode was shared (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date the episode was shared */,
  "share_url" TEXT /* URL of the shared episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_shares_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES podcast_episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the episode */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode that was rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_ratings_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES podcast_episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the comment is related to */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_comments_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES podcast_episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_tags_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES podcast_episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the transcript is associated with */,
  "transcript_text" TEXT /* Text of the transcript */,
  "transcript_date" TEXT /* Date the transcript was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_transcripts_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES podcast_episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the recommendation is for */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended episode */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_recommendations_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES podcast_episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
